drizzle-orm.interface: sqliteTable(name, cols, t => ({ pk })); within-package .references(() => tools.name) FK; cross-package FK is FORBIDDEN (logical text key only)

shape.within_package_fk: tool_platform_bindings.tool_name = text().references(() => tools.name) — within-package FK is fine
shape.logical_key_no_fk: agent_tools.agent_slug = text() WITHOUT .references() — agents live in @adhd/agent-registry; cross-package SQLite FK is forbidden (no-cross-pkg-fk). Use a plain logical text key.
shape.key_api_note: Mirror packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/db/schema.ts. Tables prefixed for the shared-DB-file convention. permission / availability / type are SEEDED TEXT lookup values, NOT sql enums.
Copy packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/db/client.ts for the WAL connection. Store tests close + reopen the handle to prove persistence.

agent-tool-registry-public-api.interface: @adhd/agent-tool-registry exports: { openToolRegistryDb, schema, ToolStore, PlatformStore, ToolBindingStore, McpServerStore, AgentToolStore }

shape.client: import { openToolRegistryDb } from '@adhd/agent-tool-registry' — better-sqlite3 WAL handle over the (shared) registry DB; drizzle DB typed over the tool schema.
shape.ToolStore: new ToolStore(db); create({name, type, description, version?, requiresApproval?, isDestructive?, dependencyToolIds?, capabilities?}) ; read(name) -> ToolRow|null ; list(typeFilter?). name is the canonical tool id (e.g. 'file_read','shell_exec','web_search').
shape.PlatformStore: new PlatformStore(db); create({id, headerFormat, supportsToolSelection}) ; read(id). headerFormat in {'yaml_frontmatter','json_object','none'}. id in {'claude_code','claude_api','openai','bedrock','cursor','vscode'}.
shape.ToolBindingStore: new ToolBindingStore(db); bind({toolName, platform, platformToolName, availability, requiresMcp?, invocationNote?}) ; resolve(toolName, platform) -> {platformToolName, availability, requiresMcp}|null ; listForPlatform(platform). availability in {'available','restricted','unavailable','requires_permission'}. THIS is the table @adhd/agent-compiler joins to build the per-platform tools: header (shell_exec -> Bash on claude_code).
shape.McpServerStore: new McpServerStore(db); create({id, transport, toolNames, configSchema}) ; read(id) ; listForTool(toolName). transport in {'stdio','sse','http'}. Used by the compiler to build the mcpServers block when a binding has requiresMcp=true.
shape.AgentToolStore: new AgentToolStore(db); grant(agentSlug, toolName, permission, contextCondition?) ; listForAgent(agentSlug) -> {toolName, permission, contextCondition}[] ; revoke(agentSlug, toolName). permission in {'full','read_only','restricted'} — grant persists the permission arg VERBATIM. agentSlug is a LOGICAL key into agent-registry's agents (no cross-package FK).
shape.key_api_note: FOUNDATION contract — NO plan dependencies (extends @adhd/agent-mcp-types only; agent_slug is a logical key, not a FK into agent-registry). The compiler (plan 5) reads AgentToolStore.listForAgent + ToolBindingStore.resolve to emit the tools: header (consumed by agent-compiler/contexts/tool-header-emit.md). The migration (plan 7) reads ToolBindingStore.resolve to map a claude_code 'tools:' frontmatter token (e.g. 'Bash') back to a canonical id ('shell_exec') and writes AgentTool grants.
